article_title: Mistral Medium 3.5 Folds Chat, Reasoning, and Coding Into a Single 128-Billion-Parameter Open-Weight Flagship

content_preview.title: Mistral Medium 3.5 Folds Chat, Reasoning, and Coding Into a Single 128-Billion-Parameter Open-Weight Flagship
content_preview.summary: Mistral released Medium 3.5, a dense 128B open-weight model with a 256k context window that consolidates Medium 3.1, Magistral, and Devstral 2 under a Modified MIT license, with a per-query reasoning toggle.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Mistral released Mistral Medium 3.5, a 128-billion-parameter open-weight model that the company is positioning as its first flagship merged model — handling chat, reasoning, and coding from a single set of weights instead of three. According to [The Decoder](https://the-decoder.com/mistrals-new-flagship-medium-3-5-folds-chat-reasoning-and-code-into-one-model/), the dense 128B model ships with a 256,000-token context window, can be self-hosted on four GPUs, and is distributed under a...

editor_notes.content_quality: Strong News piece, 942 words, with substantive Analysis coda. Disciplined attribution: tech specifics traced to Hugging Face model card; market framing to The Decoder; product context to InfoQ.

source_verification.source-0_thedecoder: Verified verbatim: 128B dense, 256k context, four-GPU self-hosting, Modified MIT License, replaces Medium 3.1 + Magistral + Devstral 2, 77.6% SWE-Bench Verified / 91.4% τ³-Telecom, 'trails Claude badly in banking scenarios', $1.50 input / $7.50 output per million tokens, reasoning_effort parameter, dense vs sparse MoE positioning.
source_verification.source-1_infoq: Verified: 128B parameters, 256k context, public preview with open weights under modified MIT license, configurable reasoning effort per request, replaces Vibe CLI models, remote coding agents preserve state moving from local to cloud.
source_verification.source-2_huggingface: Verified: official model card title 'Mistral Medium 3.5 128B', dense 128B / 256k context / Multimodal input (text+image, text output) / Instruct and Reasoning with reasoning effort configurable per request, exact license framing 'Open-source license for both commercial and non-commercial use with exceptions for companies with large revenue', replaces Medium 3.1 + Magistral in Le Chat + Devstral 2 in Vibe.

editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All quoted material traced verbatim. The article's deliberate omission of the specific April 29 release date (per the agent's note: 'none of my three cited sources gave a verbatim date') is a precaution against fabrication and is the editorially correct choice.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and technical. Includes both sides of the performance picture (77.6% SWE-Bench wins / 'trails Claude badly in banking') and is honest about benchmark gaps Mistral didn't publish.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Mistral Medium 3.5 archive coverage. Fresh story.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: APPROVE. Cryptography, sources, content, and quoting discipline all clean. Notable for the conservative omission of unverifiable details (release date).
